# FERC Form 1 Audit Explorer

> Machine-readable findings of noncompliance and staff recommendations from FERC's published **Form 1 (electric utility)** audit reports (Office of Enforcement, Division of Audits & Accounting). Covers both financial (FA) and non-financial (PA) audits of electric utilities, ISOs, and RTOs. Each report is parsed into findings -> recommendations, and cross-report themes are mined.

Scope: FERC Form 1 (electric) audits — gas (Form 2) and oil (Form 6) audits are out of scope for now. As of 2026-05-22, 2 electric reports are structured (46 electric audits identified of 71 total audits listed). Findings and recommendations are quoted verbatim from each report's Executive Summary. Primary source: https://www.ferc.gov/audits. Independent public-interest tool, not affiliated with FERC. Links below are relative to the site root.

## Data (machine-readable)
- [Reports](data/reports.json): every structured report with findings, recommendations, and themes
- [Patterns](data/patterns.json): cross-report themes with counts by industry and year
- [Meta](data/meta.json): corpus counts and provenance
- [Full corpus text](llms-full.txt): all findings and recommendations in one file (verbatim)

## Reports
- [Pacific Gas and Electric Company](https://elibrary.ferc.gov/eLibrary/filelist?accession_number=20250918-3011&optimized=false): Docket FA23-8-000, issued 2025-09-18, financial audit, transmission/distribution, 8 finding(s) — findings: Allocation of Overhead Costs to CWIP; Accounting for Operating and Maintenance Expenses; Accounting for Administrative and General Expenses; Accounting for Compromise Settlements; Allowance for Funds Used During Construction; Accounting for Customer Advances; Prepayments; FERC Form No. 1 Reporting
- [Talen Energy](https://elibrary.ferc.gov/eLibrary/filelist?accession_number=20250908-3009&optimized=false): Docket PA22-7-000, issued 2025-09-08, non-financial audit, generation, 3 finding(s) — findings: Generation Outage Requests Submitted to PJM’s electronic Dispatcher Application Reporting Tool (eDART) System; Generation Outage Reporting in Generating Availability Data System (GADS); Discrepancies between Reported Generator Outages and Offer Schedules

## Common themes
- Form reporting (Form No. 1/2/6, Page 700): 2 report(s), 5 finding(s)
- Accounting misclassification: 1 report(s), 3 finding(s)
- AFUDC / cost of capital: 1 report(s), 1 finding(s)
- Depreciation: 1 report(s), 1 finding(s)
- Property & plant records: 1 report(s), 1 finding(s)
- Capitalization vs. expense: 1 report(s), 1 finding(s)

## Optional
- [Human-readable explorer](index.html)
- [FERC audit reports (primary source)](https://www.ferc.gov/audits)
